extraction_notes: Extracted from Alphabet 2025 10-K filing. Google comprises two reporting segments (Google Services, Google Cloud) under Alphabet, plus Other Bets for non-Google businesses. Revenue models explicitly tied to segment descriptions. Customer types inferred from explicit targeting (consumers, developers, enterprises, healthcare). Geography rolled up to Worldwide based on global operations described. Parent-child offering structure preserved for YouTube services, Pixel devices, and Gemini products where explicitly nested in the filing.
